mechanism: The pricing inconsistency (rates/gold pricing fiscal dominance at 40-60% but credit/equity at less than 15%) is a manifestation of the carry trap. Credit investors accept compressed carry because Kalecki flows suppress current defaults, systematically ignoring the fiscal tail risk that rates markets are pricing.
regime_dependence: Persists as long as Kalecki flows sustain current default rates below historical averages. Resolves when a catalyst forces credit markets to reprice tail risk or when rates/gold revert.
